description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. The workflow has three jobs: build, test, and release. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt and dependencies, sets up kColorPicker and kImageAnnotator, builds the project, and uploads the build package as an artifact. The test job depends on build, downloads the artifact, and the release job depends on test, creating an automatic release with a prerelease tag.
